content.text:
```mdl
@ Non‑Disclosure Agreement – Model for confidentiality handling
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_13_nda_20

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Parties defined in the Agreement (Section “Parties”)
type PartyRole =
    | DisclosingParty(unit)
    | ReceivingParty(unit)
    | TransmissionOwner(unit)

type Party = {
    name: string,
    role: PartyRole
}

@ Confidential Information as described in Section 8 “Ownership and Use…”
type ConfidentialInformation = {
    is_returned: bool,   # has the Party returned the information?
    is_destroyed: bool,  # has the Party destroyed the information?
    is_retained: bool    # is the Party still holding the information?
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ The Party that receives Confidential Information (the “Receiving Party”)
entity receiving_party: Party

@ The piece of Confidential Information being exchanged
entity confidential_info: ConfidentialInformation

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules – Obligations, Prohibitions, Permissions
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Section 8 – “Ownership and Use of Confidential Information”
rule F no_retention_after_return_or_destruction:
    (confidential_info.is_returned or confidential_info.is_destroyed)
        implies not confidential_info.is_retained always

@ Section 8 – “Ownership and Use of Confidential Information”
rule O retain_while_needed:
    confidential_info.is_retained
        implies not (confidential_info.is_returned or confidential_info.is_destroyed) always

@ Hypothesis to be tested: “Receiving Party may retain some Confidential Information
@ even after the return or destruction of Confidential Information.”
@ This is expressed as a permission that conflicts with the prohibition above.
rule P hypothesis_retention_after_return:
    confidential_info.is_returned
        and confidential_info.is_destroyed
        and confidential_info.is_retained always
```
